Clinic,Dental Implant at Dr.Care Dental Clinic,"

Dr. Care Implant Clinic - Painless Dental Implant Therapy
• Time and cost savings, Advanced, modern and effective dental techniques, 95% chewing and aesthetic results like natural teeth
• Dr. Care Dental Clinic is committed to no impact on health, nerves, no additional costs during treatment, painless

Dr. Care provides a variety of modern dental implant services, suitable for each individual tooth loss condition. Ensuring that each patient after dental implantation will regain their confident, youthful smile.

The clinic invests in the most modern technological equipment. Our doctors are highly trained and have many years of experience in the field of dental implants. At Dr. Care Dental Clinic, patients will experience a modern, clean clinic, enthusiastic consultation, and a team of skilled doctors.
Dental implant placement is a technique of placing titanium implant posts into the jawbone in the area of tooth loss to restore fixed teeth.
• Cost and time savings: Implantation once lasts a lifetime, not affected over time because the lifespan of dental implants is very high, up to more than 20 years or a lifetime
• Chewing and aesthetics reach 95% like natural teeth: Helps you eat comfortably, makes your face fuller and younger.
• Applicable to all cases of tooth loss: Fast treatment time, minimizes pain.

• Preventing bone loss: When teeth are lost, natural jawbone resorption occurs faster. This leads to the sunken faces of patients with full-mouth tooth loss, causing a lack of confidence in communication and interaction with friends.
Step 1: Comprehensive examination and treatment planning with Implant Studio/Nobel Clinician software (50-60 minutes)
1. Doctor directly examines general oral health.
2. Cone Beam CT (3D) imaging and digital impression taking to accurately assess bone density and the condition of the tooth loss area.
3. The doctor specifically analyzes the bone condition with the patient based on the 3D imaging results to:

- Plan the treatment of oral diseases.
- Plan precise implant placement (Agree on placement location, direction, and implant size).
4. Blood tests and blood pressure checks to determine health status and ensure patients are eligible for dental implants.
Step 2: Implant placement with surgical guide according to the treatment plan (20-30 minutes)
1. Sterilization and anesthesia of the dental implant area.

column1:
Clinic,Free examination and consultation for dental implant customers at Dr. Care Clinic,"

Free Consultation and Examination for Implant Patients at Dr. Care

Dr. Care is Vietnam's first dental clinic specializing in dental implants for middle-aged people. Patients receiving dental implants who schedule an appointment through the BookingCare app will receive 5 benefits at Dr. Care Dental Clinic: free examination, consultation, 3D CT scan, lab tests, and more.

Dr. Care invests in the most modern equipment and technology. Our dentists are highly trained and have many years of experience in the field of dental implants. At Dr. Care Dental Clinic, patients will experience a modern, clean clinic, receive enthusiastic consultations, and benefit from our skilled team of dentists.
Step 1: Comprehensive Examination and Treatment Planning with Implant Studio/Nobel Clinician Software (50-60 minutes)
1. The dentist will conduct a comprehensive oral health examination.
2. Cone Beam CT (3D) scan and digital impression will be taken to accurately assess bone density and the condition of the missing teeth area.
3. The dentist will discuss the bone condition with the patient based on the 3D scan results to:

- Develop a treatment plan for oral diseases.
- Develop a precise implant placement plan (Agreeing on implant position, orientation, and size).
4. Blood and blood pressure tests will be conducted to determine the patient's health status and ensure they are eligible for dental implants.
Step 2: Implant Placement with Surgical Guide (20-30 minutes)
1. The implant area will be disinfected and anesthetized.
2. The implant will be placed using a surgical guide to ensure safety and precision down to the millimeter, making the procedure more comfortable for the patient.
4. Temporary tooth placement (Depending on the case).
Step 3: Post-operative Check-up and Suture Removal after 7-10 days (20-30 minutes)
1. X-rays will be taken to check bone integration and healing.
Step 4: Follow-up Check-up and Impression for the Crown after 3 months (20-30 minutes)
1. X-rays will be taken for checkup.
2. Impression will be taken on the implant to create the crown.
3. The crown color will be selected to match the natural teeth.
Step 5: Abutment and Crown Placement after 3 days (60 minutes)
2. Placement of the crown on the implant.
1. Final crown placement on the implant: Final check, completion of implant placement.
2. Instructions for at-home care will be provided.
3. Regular follow-up appointments will be scheduled (3-6 months or 1 year...).
• Over 13 years of in-depth research and practical experience in Implant placement
• One of Vietnam's leading dentists in full-arch All-on-X implant placement
• Currently the Professional Director at Dr. Care Dental Clinic

Clinic,Dental examination at VNES Dental,"

Dental examination at VNES Dental

VNES Dentistry is a reputable dental clinic in Dong Da District, pioneering the application of leading aesthetic dental technology from Germany, with a state-of-the-art equipment system meeting European standards. Each step in the examination and treatment process is meticulously and precisely performed, ensuring patient comfort and peace of mind.

Besides its strengths in specialized services such as aesthetic veneers, dental implants, and orthodontics, the treatment of dental diseases is also one of the clinic's key services, notably including:
The team of dentists at VNES are experienced professionals, including specialists, masters, and dentists who have undergone training in countries such as Germany and France.
• Dr Pham Hoa - Graduated from Hanoi Medical University
• Over 10 years of expertise in orthodontics
• Graduated from advanced orthodontics training courses instructed by foreign professors.

• Undergone training abroad, regularly participates in advanced training courses on implant placement and aesthetic veneers.
• Specialized training in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland

• Regularly participates in continuous training courses on orthodontics and growth orthodontics taught by foreign instructors.
